name: Potato Masala (Potato Paliya)
recipeIngredient: 1-inch Piece of Ginger, Scraped and Finely Chopped
1 small Bunch of Coriander, Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and mash them.
2. Cook the mashed potatoes in boiling water until tender.
3. In a heavy saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon oil.
4. Add mustard seeds, cumin seeds, black gram dal, Bengal gram dal, halved red chili pepper, asafoetida powder, and curry leaves.
5. When mustard seeds splutter, add the chopped green chilies, ginger, onions, and tomatoes (if using).
6. Sauté for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add salt to taste, ground turmeric, and water. Stir well.
8. Cover the pan and simmer until the onions are cooked through.
9. Mix in the mashed potatoes and boiled peas (if using). Cook for another 2 minutes until everything is well blended.
10. Garnish with chopped coriander leaves.
11. Serve hot with Masala Dosai or puris.
